work.title: Software Engineer
work.description: Full-time engineering role focused on dnb.com performance, AI-assisted quality automation, international migration work, and platform modernization across the Headless AEM stack.
highlights: Improved dnb.com Core Web Vitals from poor to near-perfect across a public-estimated 3.6M monthly visits, strengthening a channel where ~48% of traffic comes from organic search and supporting a modeled $1M+ six-month revenue opportunity.

Built a 0-to-1, Dockerized AI-enabled E2E testing framework for critical user and business workflows, integrating it into CI/CD and natural-language QA authoring to create a repeatable release-quality gate and reduce regression risk.

Led DUNS expansion verification with automated E2E coverage and AI-assisted validation/reporting, compressing large-scale readiness testing into roughly one month and replacing weeks of manual QA effort for a business-critical launch.

Shipped migration features across 15+ international markets, including Canada and UK DUNS Lookup, business-controlled 400/404/500 multilingual error pages, and Akamai/Adobe Dispatcher geo-redirection, accelerating localized launch readiness.

Supported production releases by resolving critical CTA, content fragment, form ID, cookie categorization, language URL, GA/GTM, and Marketo issues; upgraded the platform from Java 11 to Java 21 with zero production incidents or release rollbacks.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Built cloud-native data and AI automation for social intelligence reporting, combining LangChain, Docker, Google Cloud, Terraform, and Power BI to turn raw signals into business-ready visibility.
highlights: Automated processing for 20,000+ annual social data points with a scheduled Cloud Run pipeline, replacing recurring manual data preparation and saving an estimated 100+ analyst hours per year.
Fed real-time Power BI dashboards from a Google Cloud MySQL database provisioned with Terraform, reducing reporting lag from periodic exports to always-current stakeholder visibility.
Containerized a serverless LangChain workflow with Docker and Google Cloud Scheduler, creating a repeatable pattern for AI-assisted data processing that lowered operational support effort.

work.title: Web Developer
work.description: Built customer-facing ticketing features and internal operations tooling across cloud infrastructure, digital wallets, AI-assisted workflows, and inventory systems for a live ticketing platform.
highlights: Engineered a secure digital wallet integration using Apple PassKit and Google Wallet API, managing PKI signing and encryption to deliver tickets to thousands of active users.
Built Google Cloud-backed services for ticketing and operations workflows, improving reliability for event-day delivery and giving the platform a stronger foundation for future feature growth.
Developed multiple AI-assisted features that streamlined event and inventory workflows, reducing manual operations effort and creating reusable automation patterns for the team.
Designed a complex inventory management system synchronized with the Square API, reducing oversell risk and replacing manual reconciliation across ticket and product sales channels.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
